title: Reflections II: Expanding the Galaxy

'''''Reflections II: Expanding the Galaxy''''' was the second reflective-style set made by [[Decipher]] (the first one being [[Reflections: A Collector's Bounty]]) for its [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. It was released in [[January]] [[2001]].

==Gameplay==
Reflections II included previously released cards, now in a foil version with other cards from previous sets, as a way to help Decipher reduce its enormous surplus of cards. It was the first reflective-style set to include new cards.

This set contains a total of 105 Foil cards, which are 4 Ultra Rare, 62 Super Rare, and 34 Very Rare. In addition there were five Premium Foil Cards ([[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] with Blaster Rifle, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] (Japanese), [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] with Heavy Blaster Pistol, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] with Blaster Rifle, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]] with Lightsaber).

Reflections II was also known as "Expanding the Galaxy" as it included 54 New Premium cards based on the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]], and was the first to introduce such cards. Some of these included:
*[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]
*[[Talon Karrde]]
*[[Mirax Terrik Horn]]
*[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]
*[[Kir Kanos]]
*[[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]
*[[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']]
*[[LE-BO2D9|Leebo]]
*[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]
*[[Guri]]

The objectives introduced in the set were, for Dark Side: [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], depicting the great criminal enterprise, and for Light Side: Watch Your Step, which dealt with smugglers.

Reflections II was the first set to introduce combo cards, which were two previous cards combined to make one card. Some of these included:
*Out of Commission / Transmission Terminated
*Dark Maneuvers / Tallon Roll
*[[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen]] and [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Lars]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
